message:
fix: cherry-pick beads redirect and crew setup hooks from PR #2702

Cherry-pick two independent fixes from PR #2702 (foreman role):

1. beads_redirect: prefer rig-level redirect over town fallback when the
   rig has its own .beads/redirect file (Dolt server mode rigs)

2. crew/manager: run .runtime/setup-hooks/ during crew creation for
   parity with polecat setup

Co-Authored-By: rileywhite <noreply@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
